CustomField.description: End of the historical analysis period for this negotiation. Drives the modeling analytics (industry/host revenue and passenger baselines scale to this window). Defaults to today + 1 year in the Configure Data Set panel; distinct from the per-line default dates.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: End of the analysis window that drives the negotiation analytics. Defaults to today + 1 year.
CustomField.label: Analysis Period End
